titleStmt.title: SII 9.159: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 159. (A.R. No. 672 of 1922.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SAMBULINGESWARA TEMPLE AT SIRUGUPPA, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 16, Prajāpati, Kārtika, amāvāsye, Ādivāra. The date seems to be irregular. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose queen Piriya-Kētaladēvī is stated to have been ruling over Siruguppe in Tekkekallu twelve, a sub-division of Ballakunde three-hundred, Koḷanūru and another village. It records that a grant of some plots of land was made for the service of the god Kētalēśvaradēva of the village and that the Māhāsāmanta Manneya Chokarasa of the Sinda family made also a gift of some land for the service of the god and feeding of Brāhmans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḻatiḻakaṁ cāḻukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivirddhipravarddhramānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapu
da nelevīḍinoḻu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpriyāṁga
ne svastiyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudeyasahaśraphaḻabhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmī
māne kaḻahaṁśayāneyagaṇyapuṇyalāvaṇyasaṁbhōgabhāginiyanēkadēśabhā
saṁgītavidyādhari sakaḻakaḷādhariyantaṟpuramukhamaṇḍani paragītala
gōtranidhāne parivārakaḻpadrume śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaviśāḻavakṣasthaḻa
siniyarappa śrīmadabhinavasarasvati piriyakētaladēviyaru bhallaku
nūṟaṟa baṟiya tekkekallu panneṟaḍaṟoḷagaṇa bhattagrāma siriguppe
re koḷanūrantu mūṟūrumaṁ duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḻa
ḻuttamire dakṣiṇagaṁge tuṁgabhadreya teṁkaṇataḍiya siriguppeya śrī
bhukētalēsvaradēvargge śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavariśada 16 neya prajāpa
vatsarada kārttikadamāvāsyeyādivāradaṁdu dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpakkaṁ dīpakkaṁ
dyakaṁ pātrakkaṁ pāṟaigarggaṁ pāḍuvarggaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtarasarvvabādhāparihāramā
devasaṁ sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpātanimittadiṁ siriguppeyalu mūvatteraḍu gēṇa ghaḷe
yalu biṭṭa gaṟda mattareraḍu Āyūra poladalu kūṟeganūra baṭṭeyiṁ teṁkaṇa kariya
la mattaru nālvatteraḍu Ā nelada porddigeyalu siriyuradalu kariyakeyi matta
padinaiydu koḻanūralu teṁkaṇapoladalu kisumattaraidu Antumattaraḻuvatteraḍa
geyyūḻage dēvaragrāsanadoḷu Uṇba brāhmaṇargge mattarāṟu siriguppeyalu tōṁṭaṁ mattare
gāṇaveraḍu maneya nivēṣaṇaveṁṭu tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḻappa svasti samadhiga
paṁcamahāsabda mahāsāmantaṁ vijeyalakṣmīkāntaṁ bhōgāvatīpura
rēsvaraṁ vīramahēsvaraṁ siṁdhakuḻānvayaṁ saucāṁjanēyaṁ nuḍidante gaṇḍa toḍa
lugaṇḍa tappetappuvaṁ nijadaloppuvaṁ vidagdhagaṇikājanahridayasūṟekāra A
naṁkakāṟa satyakānīnaṁ svayaṁbhudēvapādāṁbujabhriṁganayyanasiṁga nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmanta manneya cokarasaru tamma ma
ya sāmyamumaṁ prabhugaḻu tamma prabhusāmyamaṁ sarvvabādhāparihā
ḻinalu nūṟu talevoṟege Ayvattu dhānyagoḷaga dēvarige
brāhmaṇarigallade goravugaḷige salladu brāhmaṇa
pūje . svadattaṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ saṣṭi
sahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . saṣṭirvarṣasaha
ṇi sasṭirvarṣasatāni ca dēvasvahu ṣa miṣṭāyāṁ jāya
keyige prabhugaḷ porage dasavaṁda byavahāriA few more lines appear to have been lost.
Digital edition of SII 9.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
